title: Senior Financial Analyst - Yes Bank Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Yes Bank Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yes Bank Global Group family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!
